channel.title: Maxim Autos — Vehicle Inventory
channel.description: Used vehicles for sale at Maxim Autos in Skokie, IL 60077. Phone +18475108947.

item.g:title: 2015 Honda Civic SE
item.g:description: 2015 Honda Civic SE Sedan, 130,772 miles, all black inside and out. The SE was Honda's Special Edition, slotted right between the base LX and the higher EX, and it is the trim Civic shoppers hunt for. It bundles roughly $1,100 in added equipment over the LX, which is why clean SE models hold value and move fast. Easy on gas, easy to drive, a perfect first car or daily commuter for the North Shore. The AC blows ice cold, so your summer commute stays cool and comfortable. The standout is Honda LaneWatch. Flip your right turn signal and a camera in the passenger mirror shows your entire blind spot on the 7 inch touchscreen, so lane changes feel a lot safer. That same screen runs Display Audio with Bluetooth and smartphone integration, plus a backup camera. The SE also adds automatic climate control, cruise control, push button start, smart entry, USB input, and alloy wheels. Under the hood is Honda's proven 1.8 liter four cylinder paired with a smooth automatic CVT and front wheel drive, EPA rated 30 city and 39 highway. These engines routinely run past 300,000 miles on basic maintenance, so at 130,772 miles this one is barely broken in, and the 2015 Civic earned an IIHS Top Safety Pick. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Skokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.g:title: 2015 Subaru Legacy Base
item.g:description: 2015 Subaru Legacy 2.5i — standard symmetrical all wheel drive, up to 36 mpg highway, roomy and quiet cabin. Blue on black, smooth CVT automatic, 2.5L boxer 4 cylinder. The all weather sedan Chicago winters were made for, without giving up fuel economy. Key features: 175 hp 2.5L boxer engine, standard symmetrical all wheel drive with superior traction in rain and snow, EPA estimated 26 city / 36 highway mpg, spacious cabin with generous rear legroom that rivals larger family sedans, enhanced sound insulation for a quiet ride. Rear legroom and passenger space compete with midsize sedans a class up. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Illinois statutory powertrain protection on qualifying vehicles, optional extended coverage available at signing Metal plates issued on-the-spot — drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL — minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the North Shore Chicago corridor. item.g:title: 2016 Honda CR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2016 Honda CR-V LX. Remote start, cooled down by the time you enter, AWD, backup cam, and legendary reliability. Silver on charcoal, automatic, 2.4L. A family SUV ready for Chicago summer road trips and year round commuting in the suburbs. The AC blows ice cold, and it is great on gas for an SUV, returning up to 31 mpg on the highway. Key features: 4WD, Honda's bulletproof 2.4L engine, automatic transmission, sport utility 4 door configuration, A/C, power windows and locks, cruise control. Practical cargo space and rear seat room, perfect first family car or commuter. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. item.g:title: 2018 Subaru Crosstrek Premium
item.g:description: 2018 Subaru Crosstrek Premium — standard symmetrical all wheel drive, 8.7 inches of ground clearance, rugged and comfortable. Blue on black, automatic, 2.0L boxer 4 cylinder. Built for anyone who wants real all weather capability with the comfort and value of a daily driver. Key features: standard symmetrical all wheel drive for exceptional grip in rain, snow, and rough terrain, 8.7 inches of ground clearance that matches true SUVs, All Weather Package with heated front seats, heated mirrors, and windshield wiper de icer, leather wrapped steering wheel, smartphone integration, and precise handling on Subaru's rigid global platform. Ready for winter roads and weekend trips alike. item.g:title: 2018 Chevrolet Trax 1LT
item.g:description: 2018 Chevrolet Trax LT AWD — confident all wheel drive, peppy turbo engine, easy to park compact SUV. Silver on black, automatic, 1.4L turbo 4 cylinder. A right sized crossover that handles Chicago winters and tight city spots with ease. Key features: 138 hp 1.4L turbo engine, all wheel drive for extra grip in rain and snow, standard Apple CarPlay and Android Auto on a 7 inch touchscreen, built in 4G LTE Wi-Fi hotspot, remote start, light and easy steering for simple parking. Flexible rear seating opens up generous cargo room when you need it. item.g:title: 2014 Kia Forte LX
item.g:description: 2014 Kia Forte LX — standard Bluetooth, strong fuel economy, roomy cabin with a class above feel. Gray on gray, 6 speed automatic, 1.8L 4 cylinder. A practical commuter sedan that is easy on gas and easy to own. Key features: 148 hp 1.8L engine, EPA estimated 25 city / 36 highway mpg, standard Bluetooth connectivity, air conditioning, power locks and mirrors, tilt and telescoping steering wheel, generous passenger volume for a compact. The 14.9 cubic foot trunk rivals many midsize sedans. item.g:title: 2015 Volvo XC60 2015.5 T6 R-Design Platinum
item.g:description: 2015 Volvo XC60 T6 R-Design Platinum. 325 HP Turbo, AWD, Paddle Shifters, Harman Kardon Audio, Panoramic Sunroof, Navigation, Adaptive Cruise Control, Full Safety Package. Gray on black, automatic, 3.0L Turbo. A Scandinavian performance crossover that looks refined and drives like a sports car, 0 to 60 in roughly 6 seconds. Surprisingly easy on gas for a 325 horsepower all wheel drive performance SUV, returning up to 24 mpg on the highway. Dual zone climate control blows ice cold, so the cabin stays comfortable through the hottest Chicago summer. Key features: turbocharged 3.0L inline six with 325 HP and 365 lb-ft of torque, all wheel drive, paddle shifters, R-Design sport package with 20 inch alloy wheels, aggressive front grille, rear diffuser and dual exhausts, sport leather seats with heat front and rear, heated steering wheel, panoramic sunroof, Harman Kardon 12 speaker premium audio, navigation, power tailgate, proximity keyless entry, Adaptive Cruise Control with queue assist, Collision Warning with auto brake, Pedestrian Detection, Blind Spot Information System, and Lane Departure Warning. Nearly 9 inches of ground clearance and over 67 cubic feet of cargo with rear seats folded. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Located in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area.
